title: The Beginning
paragraphs: Started my professional journey as a Web Development Intern at Digital Connect while completing my B.Tech in Computer Science.
Worked on real client projects, learned industry workflows, and contributed to website design, development, and deployment.

title: Building Experience
paragraphs: Worked on a growing number of client websites and web applications while strengthening full-stack development skills.
Gained experience in frontend development, backend integration, API implementation, and project delivery.

title: Exploring Artificial Intelligence
paragraphs: Expanded into Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning through internships, certifications, and hands-on projects.
Built applications involving recommendation systems, predictive analytics, and intelligent automation.

title: Engineering Advanced Systems
paragraphs: Developed research-oriented and production-grade projects across Computer Vision, Healthcare AI, Enterprise AI, Recommendation Systems, and Full Stack Platforms.
Worked on solutions involving Deep Learning, RAG systems, Generative AI, and domain-specific intelligent applications.

title: The Next Chapter
paragraphs: Graduated with a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science Engineering.
Actively seeking opportunities in Software Engineering, Full Stack Development, Artificial Intelligence, and Machine Learning while preparing for global academic and professional growth.
